case_title: SVETLANA UMAGUZINA VS. RUSSART, AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANITARIAN AID TO RU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($30 SERVICE FEE) SERVED OCT-20-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSART, AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANITARIAN AID TO RU SSIA AND CIS,  (IZABELLA GRIBANOWSKI - VICE PRESIDENT)
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY UMAGUZINA, SVETLANA AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSART, AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANITARIAN AID TO RU SSIA AND CIS,  (IZABELLA GRIBANOWSKI - VICE PRESIDENT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF UMAGUZINA, SVETLANA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UMAGUZINA, SVETLANA AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSART, AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANITARIAN AID TO RU SSIA AND CIS,  (IZABELLA GRIBANOWSKI - VICE PRESIDENT)
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-03-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-08-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RUSSART, AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANITARIAN AID TO RU SSIA AND CIS,  (IZABELLA GRIBANOWSKI - VICE PRESIDENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UMAGUZINA, SVETLANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUSSART, AMERICAN CENTER OF HUMANITARIAN AID TO RU SSIA AND CIS,  (IZABELLA GRIBANOWSKI - VICE PRESIDENT) THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S $2500.00 WAS REFUNDAVLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
